dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c Klaasen b Malinga 10 (8b 2x4 0x6 11m) SR: 125

dismissalComment.html: Oh, Malinga strikes back! We saw Jaiswal almost get out the same way in the last over. Now Malinga does the trick. It's a 142kph back of length delivery around leg and angled across. Jaiswal is again hurried on the pull and this time the miscued pull sees the ball carry to Klaasen at mid-on

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi lbw b Sakib Hussain 103 (37b 5x4 12x6 81m) SR: 278.37

dismissalComment.html: And now a misadventure ends his innings. He grimaces, he knows he played the wrong shot here. Ball was speared in full, but he turned around in his crease to scoop this over deep fine leg. Could not get under the ball, and it's struck him on the pads. As plumb as it gets. He reviews. Might as well. But he's plumb, and his face reveals it too... And yes, impact in line, wickets hitting. He has to go back.

dismissalText.long: c Verma b Nitish Kumar Reddy
dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel c Verma b Nitish Kumar Reddy 51 (35b 8x4 1x6 60m) SR: 145.71

dismissalComment.html: Extra cover runs in, and Aniket - who dropped Sooryavanshi earlier in the game - snares this one with ease! Sat up outside off and was there to be hit for Jurel, in all honesty. But gets a thick edge off his hoick looking to go downtown. Aniket had to just run in to complete a simple catch

dismissalText.commentary: Riyan Parag b Cummins 7 (9b 0x4 0x6 23m) SR: 77.77

dismissalComment.html: Cummins bowls a worldly of a yorker! The ball was speared in, and kept drifting in, drifting in, drifting in... Just sails past Parag's attempt at keeping it out, and pegs back his stumps... Cummins celebrates with both his arms spread. He enjoyed that

dismissalText.commentary: Donovan Ferreira c Klaasen b Malinga 33 (16b 3x4 3x6 27m) SR: 206.25

dismissalComment.html: Swiped across the line and right into Klaasen's hands down at long-on! He was way down leg, and got a low full toss too. There to be hit, but he mistimes this right into Klaasen's reliable bucket hands. Time to go back after a rather handy knock

dismissalText.long: c Nitish Kumar Reddy b Hinge
dismissalText.commentary: Shimron Hetmyer c Nitish Kumar Reddy b Hinge 11 (10b 1x4 0x6 19m) SR: 110

dismissalComment.html: Another full toss goes unpunished. Was floated up on the stumps, there to be hit. But Hetmyer just couldn't get under this ball as he swivel-pulls this across the line. Straight to deep midwicket. Hinge finishing with a wicket next to his name, after the beating he took earlier this innings

dismissalComment.html: Oh, Malinga strikes back! We saw Jaiswal almost get out the same way in the last over. Now Malinga does the trick. It's a 142kph back of length delivery around leg and angled across. Jaiswal is again hurried on the pull and this time the miscued pull sees the ball carry to Klaasen at mid-on

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi lbw b Sakib Hussain 103 (37b 5x4 12x6 81m) SR: 278.37

dismissalComment.html: And now a misadventure ends his innings. He grimaces, he knows he played the wrong shot here. Ball was speared in full, but he turned around in his crease to scoop this over deep fine leg. Could not get under the ball, and it's struck him on the pads. As plumb as it gets. He reviews. Might as well. But he's plumb, and his face reveals it too... And yes, impact in line, wickets hitting. He has to go back.

dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head c †Jurel b Archer 6 (5b 0x4 1x6 5m) SR: 120

dismissalComment.html: No first-ball wicket, but a first-over wicket nonetheless! Archer's bowled a superb first over here and he gets the rewards he deserves. This is a 140kph length ball around leg, cramping Head, who was backing away. Head gets squared up again and ends up with a thick edge and this time Jurel holds on. Five first-over wickets for Archer in IPL 2026!

dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c Archer b Ferreira 57 (29b 11x4 1x6 55m) SR: 196.55

dismissalComment.html: On a day where catches are going down for fun, Archer holds on to a really good one! Ferreira gets the breakthrough with a full ball cramping Abhishek for room. he backs away and looks to go down the ground. Gets a lot of height, but it's just a bit short of the boundary. Archer grabs it well above head height and does well to keep his balance

dismissalText.commentary: Nitish Kumar Reddy lbw b Brijesh Sharma 36 (18b 2x4 3x6 25m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: What a brilliant yorker, this one! Absolutely spears this one in, in front of the stumps, throwing NKR nearly off his feet. But he recovers. And also reviews instantly. Reckons there might be an edge to save him? Ball tracking turns up three reds. NKR has to make the long walk back home before he can finish this off. As good as finished this chase off, though

dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head c †Jurel b Archer 6 (5b 0x4 1x6 5m) SR: 120

dismissalComment.html: No first-ball wicket, but a first-over wicket nonetheless! Archer's bowled a superb first over here and he gets the rewards he deserves. This is a 140kph length ball around leg, cramping Head, who was backing away. Head gets squared up again and ends up with a thick edge and this time Jurel holds on. Five first-over wickets for Archer in IPL 2026!

dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c Archer b Ferreira 57 (29b 11x4 1x6 55m) SR: 196.55

dismissalComment.html: On a day where catches are going down for fun, Archer holds on to a really good one! Ferreira gets the breakthrough with a full ball cramping Abhishek for room. he backs away and looks to go down the ground. Gets a lot of height, but it's just a bit short of the boundary. Archer grabs it well above head height and does well to keep his balance

dismissalText.commentary: Ishan Kishan c Ferreira b Archer 74 (31b 11x4 3x6 59m) SR: 238.7

dismissalComment.html: Ferreira pulls out a stunner down at long-off to absolve the sins of RR's fielders! Somewhat... The ball was banged in on a hard length. Kishan whipped this one with a lofted bat, but mistimed this as one hand came off the bat handle. Ferreira lept in the air and rolled on the turf in his follow-through

dismissalText.commentary: Nitish Kumar Reddy lbw b Brijesh Sharma 36 (18b 2x4 3x6 25m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: What a brilliant yorker, this one! Absolutely spears this one in, in front of the stumps, throwing NKR nearly off his feet. But he recovers. And also reviews instantly. Reckons there might be an edge to save him? Ball tracking turns up three reds. NKR has to make the long walk back home before he can finish this off. As good as finished this chase off, though

dismissalText.commentary: Heinrich Klaasen c Ravi Bishnoi b Brijesh Sharma 29 (24b 3x4 1x6 41m) SR: 120.83

dismissalComment.html: Klaasen has pulled this juice full toss, on his hips, right to Bishnoi at deep square leg! Was there to be deposited over the ropes, but ball died on Klaasen just a little bit. Klaasen asks if it's a waist-height no ball, and the umpires oblige with a check. Ball below his waist, Klaasen has to walk back in the end
